description: Fetch all adjustments created under a merchant or store.
tags: Adjustments API takes care of handling additional amounts to orders like tips, surcharges, insurance payments etc included while performing a transaction.
Fetch all adjustments created under a merchant or store.

description: Create a new account for a merchant with specified email and role permissions.
tags: The Admin Functions API provides comprehensive administrative capabilities for managing user accounts, roles, permissions, and system configurations. These APIs enable partners and merchants to perform administrative operations programmatically, including user account management, role assignments, and system-level configurations with flexible permission controls.
Create a new account for a merchant with specified email and role permissions.

description: Create a new account for a partner with specified email and role permissions.
tags: The Admin Functions API provides comprehensive administrative capabilities for managing user accounts, roles, permissions, and system configurations. These APIs enable partners and merchants to perform administrative operations programmatically, including user account management, role assignments, and system-level configurations with flexible permission controls.
Create a new account for a partner with specified email and role permissions.

description: Generate AI-powered branding options and color schemes based on a website URL. Use this API to automatically create cohesive branding themes that match your business identity and enhance your merchant portal appearance.
tags: The AI API provides powerful artificial intelligence capabilities for merchants to enhance their product management and branding. Generate compelling product descriptions, create professional product images, extract catalog data from images, and develop branding options using advanced AI technology.

Generate AI-powered branding options and color schemes based on a website URL. Use this API to automatically create cohesive branding themes that match your business identity and enhance your merchant portal appearance.

description: Enhance product images using AI-powered image processing. This API takes a product image URL and generates enhanced versions of the image. Choose between STANDARD mode for basic enhancements or SCENE mode for contextual scene generation.
tags: The AI API provides powerful artificial intelligence capabilities for merchants to enhance their product management and branding. Generate compelling product descriptions, create professional product images, extract catalog data from images, and develop branding options using advanced AI technology.

Enhance product images using AI-powered image processing. This API takes a product image URL and generates enhanced versions of the image. Choose between STANDARD mode for basic enhancements or SCENE mode for contextual scene generation.

description: Creates a new charge for a merchant. Partners can specify the charge details.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.
Creates a new charge for a merchant. Partners can specify the charge details.

description: Updates an existing charge for a merchant. Partners can modify the amount, VAT, and optionally adjust the recurring settings.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.
Updates an existing charge for a merchant. Partners can modify the amount, VAT, and optionally adjust the recurring settings.

description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific merchant charge, including subscription details, amount, VAT, frequency, and any associated sub-charges.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific merchant charge, including subscription details, amount, VAT, frequency, and any associated sub-charges.

description: Retrieves a list of all charges associated with a particular merchant. This includes both one-time and subscription-based charges.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.
Retrieves a list of all charges associated with a particular merchant. This includes both one-time and subscription-based charges.

description: Creates new billing plans for a partner. Billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods, card brands, and terminal types.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.
Creates new billing plans for a partner. Billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods, card brands, and terminal types.

description: Retrieves all billing plans associated with a partner. Returns detailed information about each plan including pricing structures for different transaction types. Supports pagination through page number headers.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.

Retrieves all billing plans associated with a partner. Returns detailed information about each plan including pricing structures for different transaction types. Supports pagination through page number headers.

description: Retrieves billing plans specifically assigned to a merchant under a partner. This endpoint returns the billing plans that are applicable to the specified merchant.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.
Retrieves billing plans specifically assigned to a merchant under a partner. This endpoint returns the billing plans that are applicable to the specified merchant.

description: Fetch detailed information for a specific billing plan using its ID.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.
Fetch detailed information for a specific billing plan using its ID.

description: Removes one or more billing plans by their IDs for a specific partner.
tags: This section covers the APIs used to create, update, and retrieve charges associated with a merchant, as well as manage billing plans for partners. Charges can be one-time or subscription-based, while billing plans define pricing structures for different payment methods and card brands.
Removes one or more billing plans by their IDs for a specific partner.

tags: Branding API’s enables you to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard. The branding can be configured at various levels similar to the terminal config.

tags: Branding API’s enables you to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard. The branding can be configured at various levels similar to the terminal config.

tags: Branding API’s enables you to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard. The branding can be configured at various levels similar to the terminal config.

tags: Branding API’s enables you to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard. The branding can be configured at various levels similar to the terminal config.

tags: Branding API’s enables you to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard. The branding can be configured at various levels similar to the terminal config.

tags: Branding API’s enables you to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard. The branding can be configured at various levels similar to the terminal config.

tags: Branding API’s enables you to customize all customer facing pages provided by Surfboard. The branding can be configured at various levels similar to the terminal config.
Removes the existing branding configuration at the partner level.

description: Creates a token for a given externalUserID. The token must be passed via the authorization header as a bearer token in subsequent requests.
tags: These APIs are used when you would like to make requests from the client directly to Surfboard without using the API-Key and API-Secret. The generated token is restricted to perform calls limited to orders, payments and transactions.
Creates a token for a given externalUserID. The token must be passed via the authorization header as a bearer token in subsequent requests.
To get providerId and providerCertificate details, kindly contact integrations@surfboard.se or via our Slack channel.

description: Creates a new customer profile with personal information, addresses, contact details, and associated payment cards. Use this API to register new customers and store their comprehensive information for future transactions and customer management.
tags: The Customers API enables merchants to manage customer information including personal details, addresses, contact information, and associated payment cards. This API provides functionality to create customer profiles and retrieve detailed customer information for enhanced customer relationship management.

Creates a new customer profile with personal information, addresses, contact details, and associated payment cards. Use this API to register new customers and store their comprehensive information for future transactions and customer management.

description: Retrieves customer information using the customer ID. Use this API to get detailed customer profile including personal information, addresses, contact details, and associated payment cards for customer management and transaction processing.
tags: The Customers API enables merchants to manage customer information including personal details, addresses, contact information, and associated payment cards. This API provides functionality to create customer profiles and retrieve detailed customer information for enhanced customer relationship management.

Retrieves customer information using the customer ID. Use this API to get detailed customer profile including personal information, addresses, contact details, and associated payment cards for customer management and transaction processing.

description: Creates a new gift card with specified type and configuration. Gift cards can be FUND type (with monetary value) or ENTITLEMENT type (with usage limits).
tags: The Gift Cards API enables merchants to create, manage, and track gift cards. Gift cards can be of two types: FUND (monetary value) or ENTITLEMENT (usage-based). The API supports creating gift cards, retrieving gift card information, and tracking transactions.
Creates a new gift card with specified type and configuration. Gift cards can be FUND type (with monetary value) or ENTITLEMENT type (with usage limits).

description: Retrieves a paginated list of all gift cards for a merchant. Supports filtering by type and status.
tags: The Gift Cards API enables merchants to create, manage, and track gift cards. Gift cards can be of two types: FUND (monetary value) or ENTITLEMENT (usage-based). The API supports creating gift cards, retrieving gift card information, and tracking transactions.
Retrieves a paginated list of all gift cards for a merchant. Supports filtering by type and status.

description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific gift card using its ID or PAN. Includes customer details, transaction history summary, and format representations.
tags: The Gift Cards API enables merchants to create, manage, and track gift cards. Gift cards can be of two types: FUND (monetary value) or ENTITLEMENT (usage-based). The API supports creating gift cards, retrieving gift card information, and tracking transactions.
Retrieves detailed information for a specific gift card using its ID or PAN. Includes customer details, transaction history summary, and format representations.

description: Retrieves a paginated list of transactions for a specific gift card. Supports filtering by transaction type.
tags: The Gift Cards API enables merchants to create, manage, and track gift cards. Gift cards can be of two types: FUND (monetary value) or ENTITLEMENT (usage-based). The API supports creating gift cards, retrieving gift card information, and tracking transactions.
Retrieves a paginated list of transactions for a specific gift card. Supports filtering by transaction type.

description: Creates a shipment order for terminals and other accessories. Use this API to initiate an order to ship terminals and other accessories to merchants.
tags: Partners can place orders for products (terminals and other accessories) from Surfboard. As a partner, you can provide a product catalog containing a range of product options for merchants to choose from.
Creates a shipment order for terminals and other accessories. Use this API to initiate an order to ship terminals and other accessories to merchants.

description: Retrieves the status of the shipment order. Use this API to get the shipment status of ordered terminals and other accessories.
tags: Partners can place orders for products (terminals and other accessories) from Surfboard. As a partner, you can provide a product catalog containing a range of product options for merchants to choose from.
Retrieves the status of the shipment order. Use this API to get the shipment status of ordered terminals and other accessories.

description: Creates bulk shipment orders for terminals and other accessories to partners. Use this API to initiate orders to ship multiple terminals and accessories in bulk.
tags: Partners can place orders for products (terminals and other accessories) from Surfboard. As a partner, you can provide a product catalog containing a range of product options for merchants to choose from.
Creates bulk shipment orders for terminals and other accessories to partners. Use this API to initiate orders to ship multiple terminals and accessories in bulk.

description: Retrieves all orders placed by a partner for terminals and accessories. Use this API to get the status and details of all orders under a partner.
tags: Partners can place orders for products (terminals and other accessories) from Surfboard. As a partner, you can provide a product catalog containing a range of product options for merchants to choose from.
Retrieves all orders placed by a partner for terminals and accessories. Use this API to get the status and details of all orders under a partner.

description: Creates a return request for terminals using the API. This enhanced version allows for more detailed merchant information and multiple return order lines.
tags: Partners can place orders for products (terminals and other accessories) from Surfboard. As a partner, you can provide a product catalog containing a range of product options for merchants to choose from.
Creates a return request for terminals using the API. This enhanced version allows for more detailed merchant information and multiple return order lines.

description: Retrieves return requests for a specific merchant using the API. Supports filtering by status and provides detailed return information.
tags: Partners can place orders for products (terminals and other accessories) from Surfboard. As a partner, you can provide a product catalog containing a range of product options for merchants to choose from.
Retrieves return requests for a specific merchant using the API. Supports filtering by status and provides detailed return information.

description: Retrieves all orders placed for a specific merchant. Use this API to get the status and details of all orders for a particular merchant.
tags: Partners can place orders for products (terminals and other accessories) from Surfboard. As a partner, you can provide a product catalog containing a range of product options for merchants to choose from.
Retrieves all orders placed for a specific merchant. Use this API to get the status and details of all orders for a particular merchant.

description: As a partner, use the Create Merchant API to onboard your sub-merchants for using Surfboard's payment solutions. You can also display products ( terminals, accessories etc. from Surfboard) for your merchants to choose, set product pricing plans for your merchant, display the product catalogue, and pre-select products for your merchants.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.

As a partner, use the Create Merchant API to onboard your sub-merchants for using Surfboard's payment solutions. You can also display products ( terminals, accessories etc. from Surfboard) for your merchants to choose, set product pricing plans for your merchant, display the product catalogue, and pre-select products for your merchants.
Merchant applications in test and demo environments are configured for automatic approval.

description: Retrieves the status of the merchant onboarding. After initiating the onboarding for the sub-merchant, use the Check Application Status API to get updates regarding the application’s progress. After the merchant is created, the Merchant ID and Store ID are also available through the webhook.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.

Retrieves the status of the merchant onboarding. After initiating the onboarding for the sub-merchant, use the Check Application Status API to get updates regarding the application’s progress. After the merchant is created, the Merchant ID and Store ID are also available through the webhook.

description: Creates a multi-merchant group. Partners can use this API to create a multi-merchant group that enables multiple merchants to use the same terminal. Individual merchants are tagged to this group, enabling access to all the terminals registered in this group.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.

Creates a multi-merchant group. Partners can use this API to create a multi-merchant group that enables multiple merchants to use the same terminal. Individual merchants are tagged to this group, enabling access to all the terminals registered in this group.

description: Retrieves a list of all merchants applications with a specific partner.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.
Retrieves a list of all merchants applications with a specific partner.

description: Retrieves information for a specific merchant. As a partner you can use this API to get information regarding your sub-merchants
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.
Retrieves information for a specific merchant. As a partner you can use this API to get information regarding your sub-merchants

description: Fetch all existing multi-merchants groups under partner.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.
Fetch all existing multi-merchants groups under partner.

description: Updates the merchant details. You can use this API to edit the email address, merchant logo URL, and phone number of a merchant.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.
Updates the merchant details. You can use this API to edit the email address, merchant logo URL, and phone number of a merchant.

description: Retrieves a list of all terminals associated with a specific merchant. You can use this API to get information regarding all the terminals registered under a merchant.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.
Retrieves a list of all terminals associated with a specific merchant. You can use this API to get information regarding all the terminals registered under a merchant.

description: Retrieves a list of all merchants associated with a specific partner. Partners can use this API to get information regarding all their sub-merchants.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.
Retrieves a list of all merchants associated with a specific partner. Partners can use this API to get information regarding all their sub-merchants.

description: Retrieves the list all contracts under the specific merchant.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.
Retrieves the list all contracts under the specific merchant.

description: This API is available for partners who manage their own storage and terminal delivery solution and requires a PCI compliant storage setup. The API can be used to activate terminals that are tagged to you as a partner. This API will return an error if the entered serial number is not available to you.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.

This API is available for partners who manage their own storage and terminal delivery solution and requires a PCI compliant storage setup. The API can be used to activate terminals that are tagged to you as a partner. This API will return an error if the entered serial number is not available to you.

description: Retrieves aggregated transaction analytics for a specific merchant. This can include analytics by store, terminal, date range, card brand, and more.
tags: A merchant is created in Surfboard with the completion of an onboarding process. Merchant creation can be initiated through ISVs who have partnered with Surfboard to offer payment solutions to their merchants in addition to their existing products.
Retrieves aggregated transaction analytics for a specific merchant. This can include analytics by store, terminal, date range, card brand, and more.

description: Use this API to start a NFC reading session on the terminal.
tags: The NFC Reading API's enables you to read NFC tags for an order.
Use this API to start a NFC reading session on the terminal.

description: This API lets you fetch all reading sessions created under the terminal
tags: The NFC Reading API's enables you to read NFC tags for an order.
This API lets you fetch all reading sessions created under the terminal

description: This API retrieves all the tags read during the specified session.
tags: The NFC Reading API's enables you to read NFC tags for an order.
This API retrieves all the tags read during the specified session.

description: This API retrieves the current status of the NFC reading session.
tags: The NFC Reading API's enables you to read NFC tags for an order.
This API retrieves the current status of the NFC reading session.

description: This endpoint completes an ongoing NFC (RFID) reading session. You must provide both the terminal ID and session ID in the path, as well as an optional result in the request body.
tags: The NFC Reading API's enables you to read NFC tags for an order.
This endpoint completes an ongoing NFC (RFID) reading session. You must provide both the terminal ID and session ID in the path, as well as an optional result in the request body.

description: Subscribe to receive automated notifications for merchant events. You must provide at least one notification channel: email, slackUrl, or sftpInfo to create a notification subscription. This endpoint supports multiple notification channels including EMAIL, SLACK, and SFTP.
tags: The Notifications API enables merchants and partners to subscribe to event notifications via SFTP or email. It allows you to configure automated notifications for various events and manage your notification subscriptions.

Subscribe to receive automated notifications for merchant events. You must provide at least one notification channel: email, slackUrl, or sftpInfo to create a notification subscription. This endpoint supports multiple notification channels including EMAIL, SLACK, and SFTP.

description: Retrieves all external notifications configured for a merchant. Supports filtering by event type, notification channel, and notification ID
tags: The Notifications API enables merchants and partners to subscribe to event notifications via SFTP or email. It allows you to configure automated notifications for various events and manage your notification subscriptions.
Retrieves all external notifications configured for a merchant. Supports filtering by event type, notification channel, and notification ID

description: Unsubscribe from a specific notification for a merchant. This endpoint removes the notification subscription identified by the notification ID
tags: The Notifications API enables merchants and partners to subscribe to event notifications via SFTP or email. It allows you to configure automated notifications for various events and manage your notification subscriptions.
Unsubscribe from a specific notification for a merchant. This endpoint removes the notification subscription identified by the notification ID

description: Subscribe to receive automated notifications for partner events. You must provide at least one notification channel: email, slackUrl, or sftpInfo to create a notification subscription. This endpoint supports multiple notification channels including EMAIL, SLACK, and SFTP.
tags: The Notifications API enables merchants and partners to subscribe to event notifications via SFTP or email. It allows you to configure automated notifications for various events and manage your notification subscriptions.

Subscribe to receive automated notifications for partner events. You must provide at least one notification channel: email, slackUrl, or sftpInfo to create a notification subscription. This endpoint supports multiple notification channels including EMAIL, SLACK, and SFTP.

description: Retrieves all external notifications configured for a partner. Supports filtering by event type, notification channel, and notification ID
tags: The Notifications API enables merchants and partners to subscribe to event notifications via SFTP or email. It allows you to configure automated notifications for various events and manage your notification subscriptions.
Retrieves all external notifications configured for a partner. Supports filtering by event type, notification channel, and notification ID

description: Unsubscribe from a specific notification for a partner. This endpoint removes the notification subscription identified by the notification ID
tags: The Notifications API enables merchants and partners to subscribe to event notifications via SFTP or email. It allows you to configure automated notifications for various events and manage your notification subscriptions.
Unsubscribe from a specific notification for a partner. This endpoint removes the notification subscription identified by the notification ID

description: The createOrder API lets you create and pay for an order in a single call—supporting purchases, returns, and multiple payment methods for faster checkout.
tags: The Orders API enables merchants to create and manage orders. Orders must be created to initiate payments because each payment is assigned to a specific order. In this way, each payment is coupled with the total payable amount and detailed line items like products purchased, the quantity of products, the individual price per item etc. This streamlines the payment operations (tracking, receipts, refunds etc.).
The createOrder API lets you create and pay for an order in a single call—supporting purchases, returns, and multiple payment methods for faster checkout.

description: Updates the details of an existing order. This API allows you to modify order information while retaining the same Order ID as the original order. Once a payment has been initiated for the order, further updates are no longer permitted.
tags: The Orders API enables merchants to create and manage orders. Orders must be created to initiate payments because each payment is assigned to a specific order. In this way, each payment is coupled with the total payable amount and detailed line items like products purchased, the quantity of products, the individual price per item etc. This streamlines the payment operations (tracking, receipts, refunds etc.).

Updates the details of an existing order. This API allows you to modify order information while retaining the same Order ID as the original order. Once a payment has been initiated for the order, further updates are no longer permitted.

description: Retrieves the status of the given order. Use this API to obtain information about the current status of the order including the respective payment and transaction details.
tags: The Orders API enables merchants to create and manage orders. Orders must be created to initiate payments because each payment is assigned to a specific order. In this way, each payment is coupled with the total payable amount and detailed line items like products purchased, the quantity of products, the individual price per item etc. This streamlines the payment operations (tracking, receipts, refunds etc.).

In this way, each payment is coupled with the total payable amount and detailed line items like products purchased, the quantity of products, the individual price per item etc. This streamlines the payment operations (tracking, receipts, refunds etc.).
Retrieves the details of an existing order using its Order Id.

description: Cancels a specific order. Use this API to cancel any created order using its Order ID. However, you cannot cancel orders that are already completed.

In this way, each payment is coupled with the total payable amount and detailed line items like products purchased, the quantity of products, the individual price per item etc. This streamlines the payment operations (tracking, receipts, refunds etc.).
Cancels a specific order. Use this API to cancel any created order using its Order ID. However, you cannot cancel orders that are already completed.

description: This API allows you to store cash register details for receipts.
tags: The Orders API enables merchants to create and manage orders. Orders must be created to initiate payments because each payment is assigned to a specific order. In this way, each payment is coupled with the total payable amount and detailed line items like products purchased, the quantity of products, the individual price per item etc. This streamlines the payment operations (tracking, receipts, refunds etc.).

tags: The Orders API enables merchants to create and manage orders. Orders must be created to initiate payments because each payment is assigned to a specific order. In this way, each payment is coupled with the total payable amount and detailed line items like products purchased, the quantity of products, the individual price per item etc. This streamlines the payment operations (tracking, receipts, refunds etc.).

tags: The Orders API enables merchants to create and manage orders. Orders must be created to initiate payments because each payment is assigned to a specific order. description: Activates multiple payment methods for a merchant in a single request. Each payment method can be enabled with a boolean value or configured with specific settings using an object.
tags: The Payment Methods API enables you to add, manage, and remove additional payments methods offered by Surfboard. While the CARD is the default payment method, these APIs allows for the addition and removal of other payment methods such as AMEX and SWISH. These payment methods can be added to specific merchants and/or stores, offering versatility in payment strategies.
Activates multiple payment methods for a merchant in a single request. Each payment method can be enabled with a boolean value or configured with specific settings using an object.

description: Deactivates a specific payment method. Use this API to deactivate the payment method added to the merchant or store using its Payment Method ID.
tags: The Payment Methods API enables you to add, manage, and remove additional payments methods offered by Surfboard. While the CARD is the default payment method, these APIs allows for the addition and removal of other payment methods such as AMEX and SWISH. These payment methods can be added to specific merchants and/or stores, offering versatility in payment strategies.
Deactivates a specific payment method. Use this API to deactivate the payment method added to the merchant or store using its Payment Method ID.

description: Retrieves information for a specific payment method. Use this API to get information regarding the payment method using its Payment Method ID.
tags: The Payment Methods API enables you to add, manage, and remove additional payments methods offered by Surfboard. While the CARD is the default payment method, these APIs allows for the addition and removal of other payment methods such as AMEX and SWISH. These payment methods can be added to specific merchants and/or stores, offering versatility in payment strategies.
Retrieves information for a specific payment method. Use this API to get information regarding the payment method using its Payment Method ID.

description: Retrieves a list of all payment methods activated for a specific merchant. You can use this API to get information regarding all the payment methods added for the merchant.
tags: The Payment Methods API enables you to add, manage, and remove additional payments methods offered by Surfboard. While the CARD is the default payment method, these APIs allows for the addition and removal of other payment methods such as AMEX and SWISH. These payment methods can be added to specific merchants and/or stores, offering versatility in payment strategies.
Retrieves a list of all payment methods activated for a specific merchant. You can use this API to get information regarding all the payment methods added for the merchant.

description: Initiates a payment for a specific order. Use this API to initiate a payment for the order created. The default method for processing the initiated payment is via card. Additional payment methods can be enabled using the Payment Methods API.
tags: The Payments API enables merchants to initiate, check the status of, cancel, and void payments. The payment operations are performed for the orders created by the merchants. This ensures that each payment is associated with a specific order and has rich data associated with it.

Initiates a payment for a specific order. Use this API to initiate a payment for the order created. The default method for processing the initiated payment is via card. Additional payment methods can be enabled using the Payment Methods API.

description: Cancels the initiated payment. You can use this API to cancel the payment instance created. However, you cannot cancel a completed payment. If the payment is already completed, you can use the Void a Payment API to void the specific payment.
tags: The Payments API enables merchants to initiate, check the status of, cancel, and void payments. The payment operations are performed for the orders created by the merchants. This ensures that each payment is associated with a specific order and has rich data associated with it.

Cancels the initiated payment. You can use this API to cancel the payment instance created. However, you cannot cancel a completed payment. If the payment is already completed, you can use the Void a Payment API to void the specific payment.

description: Voids a completed payment. If a merchant identifies an issue with a payment soon after it has been completed, use this API to promptly void the payment, thereby preventing potential issues arising from incorrect payments. Note that payment has to be in status ‘PAYMENT_COMPLETED’ and void triggered before 23:00 UTC. For orders with delayCapture set to true, void can be initiated anytime before the capture call.
tags: The Payments API enables merchants to initiate, check the status of, cancel, and void payments. The payment operations are performed for the orders created by the merchants. This ensures that each payment is associated with a specific order and has rich data associated with it.

Voids a completed payment. If a merchant identifies an issue with a payment soon after it has been completed, use this API to promptly void the payment, thereby preventing potential issues arising from incorrect payments. Note that payment has to be in status ‘PAYMENT_COMPLETED’ and void triggered before 23:00 UTC. For orders with delayCapture set to true, void can be initiated anytime before the capture call.

description: Use this API to complete the authorisation and capture a payment while using the pre-auth flow or to capture a payment when the delayCapture flag is set.
tags: The Payments API enables merchants to initiate, check the status of, cancel, and void payments. The payment operations are performed for the orders created by the merchants. This ensures that each payment is associated with a specific order and has rich data associated with it.
Use this API to complete the authorisation and capture a payment while using the pre-auth flow or to capture a payment when the delayCapture flag is set.

description: Retrieves the status of the capture payment request. Capture payments for delayed capture is an asynchronous request that is processed in batches. Once the initial capturePayments request is made, please make this call after approximately 30 minutes to get the response
tags: The Payments API enables merchants to initiate, check the status of, cancel, and void payments. The payment operations are performed for the orders created by the merchants. This ensures that each payment is associated with a specific order and has rich data associated with it.

description: Creates a store under a merchant. Use this API to create a store to which you can register your terminals. You can create a single store or multiple stores under a merchant based on your requirements.
tags: Stores represent the physical or virtual location of sales. Stores have to be created for each merchant before they can register terminals to accept payments. Onboarded merchants can have one or more stores created under them based on their business requirements.

Creates a store under a merchant. Use this API to create a store to which you can register your terminals. You can create a single store or multiple stores under a merchant based on your requirements.

description: Deactivates a store. Use this API to deactivate any store under a merchant. You can delete a store instantly or schedule it to be deleted at a later date. Stores can be deleted only if there are no terminals registered to it. If a store has terminals registered to it, you will have to delink the terminal from the store or change the terminal to another store under the same merchant.
tags: Stores represent the physical or virtual location of sales. Stores have to be created for each merchant before they can register terminals to accept payments. Onboarded merchants can have one or more stores created under them based on their business requirements.

description: Registers a new terminal to store. For SDK-based workflows, this API call is unnecessary as SDK methods covers terminal registration. After the terminal is registered to a store under the merchant, it cannot be repurposed to be used by another merchant. However, you can use the Change Store API to transfer the terminal to another store under the same merchant.
tags: Surfboard offers a diverse range of hardware terminals along with the SoftPOS terminal that can be integrated with your existing ECRs and checkout systems. The Terminals API allows you to register and manage these terminals. For CheckoutPro integration, you can use the Terminals APIs to link the terminal to your CheckoutPro, check the linkage status, and delink the terminal from your CheckoutPro.

Registers a new terminal to store. For SDK-based workflows, this API call is unnecessary as SDK methods covers terminal registration. After the terminal is registered to a store under the merchant, it cannot be repurposed to be used by another merchant. However, you can use the Change Store API to transfer the terminal to another store under the same merchant.

description: Sets tips configurations for all the terminals registered to a specific merchant. Use this API to configure the same tips configurations across multiple terminals associated with a specific merchant.
tags: Tips APIs enable merchants to integrate tipping functionality directly into the payment terminals. These APIs provide options for adding either preset or custom tip amounts to the overall payment amount on the terminal screen. When customers make payments, they can choose from these displayed preset tip values or decide to enter a custom amount based on their preference. Tips can be configured at the merchant, store, or terminal levels, allowing for flexibility to match your unique operational requirements.

When customers make payments, they can choose from these displayed preset tip values or decide to enter a custom amount based on their preference. Retrieves the tips configurations for all terminals registered to a specific merchant. Use this API to get all the tips configurations for all the terminals registered to a merchant.

description: Retrieves the tips configurations for all terminals registered to a specific store. Use this API to get all the tips configurations for all the terminals registered to a store.

Tips can be configured at the merchant, store, or terminal levels, allowing for flexibility to match your unique operational requirements.

Tips APIs enable merchants to integrate tipping functionality directly into the payment terminals. These APIs provide options for adding either preset or custom tip amounts to the overall payment amount on the terminal screen. When customers make payments, they can choose from these displayed preset tip values or decide to enter a custom amount based on their preference. Tips can be configured at the merchant, store, or terminal levels, allowing for flexibility to match your unique operational requirements.

description: This event is triggered whenever there's a change in the shipment status of the terminals and accessories ordered.
tags: The Logistics events reference details the notifications and triggers associated with product shipment orders, specifically terminals and accessories, made with the Logistics API. These events offer real-time updates on product order statuses from placement to delivery. By monitoring these events, partners can ensure efficient order tracking and timely fulfillment for the products for the merchants.
This event is triggered whenever there's a change in the shipment status of the terminals and accessories ordered.

description: This event is triggered when the merchant application is created, and the KYB URL is generated. At this point, the merchant needs to provide the necessary details via the Web KYB.
tags: The Merchant application events reference details the various events that arise during the merchant onboarding process in Surfboard. From the moment a partner initiates the onboarding by creating a merchant application, to the Know Your Business (KYB) step, theses webhooks provides real-time updates on the progress of each merchant application. By tracking these events, partners can ensure timely and accurate completion of merchant onboarding, enhancing the overall efficiency of the onboarding experience.

description: This event is triggered when an order is updated.
tags: The Order events reference details the various triggers and notifications associated with order processes. These events provide real-time updates on the status and progress of orders, from initiation to completion. By monitoring order events, you can obtain insights into the payment flow, detect issues, and optimize the checkout experience. Each event is linked to specific order attributes, enabling detailed tracking, ensuring seamless order and payment management.
This event is triggered when an order is updated.
